title: Vicloon Baby Nail Kit, 4-in-1 Baby Nail Care Set, Baby Nail Care Tool, Baby Nail Care Set Manicure Set Includes Baby Scissors, Nail Clippers, Baby Nail File and Tweezer for Newborn Infant Toddler
features: 4-IN-1 BABY NAIL CARE SET: Contains everything you need for nail care: nail clippers, nail file, nail scissors and tweezers, all in a sophisticated storage case. Can be used for our newborn baby's daily nail trimming needs

SAFE FOR BABY: Made of high quality stainless steel and ABS material, BPA free and does not contain any harmful substances for babies, safe for babies and reassuring for parents. The tip is rounded and the edge is curved. The fine blades can cut nails painlessly

EASY TO USE AND CLEAN: The newborn grooming kit is designed for babies. The ergonomic handle prevents slipping and is easy for you to use. It can be easily cleaned with water or sterilised with alcohol or UV light

PORTABLE PACKAGING: The nail kit is very lightweight and compact, all tools are packed in a small box, easy to store and carry. When you are outdoors or travelling, you can carry it in your purse or handbag. Keep your little nails tidy at all times

IDEAL BABY GIFT: The Newborn Essentials Kit contains almost everything you need as a new parent. The baby set is an ideal gift for mums-to-be or new parents. Perfect for baby shower gifts, suitable for both baby boys and girls. All mums will love this baby manicure set
